mapper.sql: id, user_id, question_id, error_count, source, last_wrong_answer, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM user_wrong_question WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_wrong_question WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_wrong_question WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND question_id = #{questionId}
